title: TridentboxRooms
description: Automated 1v1 PvP arena system with dynamic glass cages and portals. High-performance BoxPvP and KitPvP solution for Paper/Spigot servers.
body:
**TridentboxRooms | The Ultimate Automated 1v1 PvP Arena Solution**

**High-performance, fully automated 1v1 PvP system designed for modern Minecraft servers.**

[GUI Showcase](https://youtu.be/luSAMKpa948)

---

## Overview
TridentboxRooms removes the need for manual duels or complex lobby setups. Players simply walk into a designated area, and the plugin handles everything—from sealing the perimeter with dynamic glass cages to managing win/loss states and teleportation.

## Why Choose TridentboxRooms?
Whether you run a **BoxPvP, Factions, or KitPvP** server, providing a seamless 1v1 experience is essential. This plugin is a **"Set and Forget"** solution. With high-performance indexing and a built-in GUI editor, you can deploy professional combat rooms in minutes without touching a single configuration file.

**Arena Editor GUI**
![arenaeditor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52adaa4b0f3d1f97a7266c85b28278cbd0f69952.png)
*Configure everything in-game with zero file editing required.*

---

## Unique Arena Modes
1.  **Glass Mode:** Perfect for open-world zones. When a fight starts, a temporary glass perimeter seals the area.
2.  **Portal Mode:** Ideal for lobbies. Players step into 3D zones and are teleported to a private arena.

**Arena Showcases**

| Glass Arena in Action | Portal Arena Entrance |
| :---: | :---: |
| [![Glass Arena Video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/ISyjzpbwj9A/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ISyjzpbwj9A) | [![Portal Arena Video](https://img.youtube.com/vi/4c4BFEQo3qc/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4c4BFEQo3qc) |

---

## Key Features
- **Advanced Potion System**: Apply any of the 30+ Minecraft potion effects per arena.
- **Intelligent Session Management**: Winner stays feature allows back-to-back challenges.
- **Built-in Anti-Escape**: Automatically blocks Ender Pearls, Chorus Fruit, and Flight during combat.
- **PlaceholderAPI Support**: Display arena status and fighter statistics on your scoreboard.

**Potion Configuration Menu**
![potioneditor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/543839d30ba949bf0d2055ae4c0d5085c2698948.png)

---

## Technical Excellence
- **Zero-Lag Design**: O(1) Spatial Indexing for instantaneous player detection.
- **Professional Aesthetics**: Custom Unicode font mode for all in-game messages.
- **Dynamic Action Bar**: Real-time countdowns for winners and session status.
- **Flexible Storage**: Native support for YAML, H2, and MySQL.

| Clean Small Font Style | Action Bar Countdown |
| :---: | :---: |
| ![Small Font]![buildingoff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cc95e8c0e5dc9e826b551a78d734db869d26855.webp) | ![Action Bar]![glassdissapear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94ddfc60d3e27a4dca5477a14964737737267cf7.webp) |
![potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/728f208a3ad15f9666bdf052f8d6de0781ef4194.webp)

---

## Commands & Permissions

| Command | Permission | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/arena wand` | `tridentbox.admin.wand` | Get the region selection wand |
| `/arena portalwand` | `tridentbox.admin.wand` | Get the portal zone wand |
| `/arena create <name> <type>` | `tridentbox.admin.create` | Create GLASS or PORTAL arena |
| `/arena edit <name>` | `tridentbox.admin.edit` | Open the arena editor GUI |
| `/arena info <name>` | `tridentbox.admin.info` | Show detailed arena info |
| `/arena reload` | `tridentbox.admin.reload` | Reload config and messages |

---
